content:
Some important announcements on AI are coming from the French president Macron during the next G7 in June. Croissant native support is extremely important for Dataverse!
Just teaser here https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7458513650753081344/

Thank you Slava. Looks like a great meeting! This is super important. Physical (spatio-temporal) inferencing models are potentially far more scalable than symbol-based models (LLMs), and can be designed to produce results that are auditable and reproducible.
